GeneDef.label: backup
GeneDef.description: Carriers of this gene have a strong psychic connection with the mechanoid fleet. Upon death, their body skips to the nearest ship, where they undergo regeneration and can then return.

customEffectDescriptions.li: The pawn can be recalled through the <color=#8a8ae6>console</color>, <color=#8a8ae6>summoned</color> as a boss mechanoid.
This <color=#8a8ae6>summoning</color> returns all pawns that died with this gene, if they still <color=#8a8ae6>exist</color>.
Summon will fail if mechhive is deactivated.
